top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_weekly_statements
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'male';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_weekly_statements
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_weekly_statements
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_weekly_statements
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_weekly_statements
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_weekly_statements
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';
